flavor: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: pawmo
label: Pawmo
flavor: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: pawmot
label: Pawmot
flavor: Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: tandemaus
label: Tandemaus
flavor: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

name: maushold-family-of-four
label: Maushold
flavor: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

name: fidough
label: Fidough
flavor: The yeast in Fidough’s breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

name: dachsbun
label: Dachsbun
flavor: The surface of this Pokémon’s skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma.

name: smoliv
label: Smoliv
flavor: This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.

name: dolliv
label: Dolliv
flavor: It basks in the sun to its heart’s content until the fruits on its head ripen. After that, Dolliv departs from human settlements and goes on a journey.

name: arboliva
label: Arboliva
flavor: This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.

name: squawkabilly-green-plumage
label: Squawkabilly
flavor: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

name: nacli
label: Nacli
flavor: The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.

name: naclstack
label: Naclstack
flavor: It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.

name: garganacl
label: Garganacl
flavor: Many Pokémon gather around Garganacl, hoping to lick at its mineral-rich salt.

name: charcadet
label: Charcadet
flavor: Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

name: armarouge
label: Armarouge
flavor: This Pokémon clads itself in armor that has been fortified by psychic and fire energy, and it shoots blazing fireballs.

name: ceruledge
label: Ceruledge
flavor: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

name: tadbulb
label: Tadbulb
flavor: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

name: bellibolt
label: Bellibolt
flavor: What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo.

name: wattrel
label: Wattrel
flavor: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they’re a popular delicacy.

name: kilowattrel
label: Kilowattrel
flavor: It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

name: maschiff
label: Maschiff
flavor: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

name: mabosstiff
label: Mabosstiff
flavor: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

name: shroodle
label: Shroodle
flavor: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

name: grafaiai
label: Grafaiai
flavor: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

name: bramblin
label: Bramblin
flavor: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: brambleghast
label: Brambleghast
flavor: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: toedscool
label: Toedscool
flavor: Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

name: toedscruel
label: Toedscruel
flavor: It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

name: klawf
label: Klawf
flavor: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

name: capsakid
label: Capsakid
flavor: Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

name: scovillain
label: Scovillain
flavor: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

name: rellor
label: Rellor
flavor: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

name: rabsca
label: Rabsca
flavor: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

name: flittle
label: Flittle
flavor: It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

name: espathra
label: Espathra
flavor: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

name: tinkatink
label: Tinkatink
flavor: This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.

name: tinkatuff
label: Tinkatuff
flavor: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.

name: tinkaton
label: Tinkaton
flavor: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.

name: wiglett
label: Wiglett
flavor: Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

name: wugtrio
label: Wugtrio
flavor: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

name: bombirdier
label: Bombirdier
flavor: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

name: finizen
label: Finizen
flavor: Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

name: palafin-zero
label: Palafin
flavor: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

name: varoom
label: Varoom
flavor: The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: revavroom
label: Revavroom
flavor: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

name: cyclizar
label: Cyclizar
flavor: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.

name: orthworm
label: Orthworm
flavor: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

name: glimmet
label: Glimmet
flavor: Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself.

name: glimmora
label: Glimmora
flavor: Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.

name: greavard
label: Greavard
flavor: This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

name: houndstone
label: Houndstone
flavor: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

name: flamigo
label: Flamigo
flavor: Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

name: cetoddle
label: Cetoddle
flavor: It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

name: cetitan
label: Cetitan
flavor: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

name: veluza
label: Veluza
flavor: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

name: dondozo
label: Dondozo
flavor: It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.

name: tatsugiri-curly
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: annihilape
label: Annihilape
flavor: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

name: clodsire
label: Clodsire
flavor: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

name: farigiraf
label: Farigiraf
flavor: The hardened head from the tail protects the head of the main body as Farigiraf whips its long neck around to headbutt enemies.

name: dudunsparce-two-segment
label: Dudunsparce
flavor: It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.

name: kingambit
label: Kingambit
flavor: Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.

name: great-tusk
label: Great Tusk
flavor: This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.

name: scream-tail
label: Scream Tail
flavor: It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.

name: brute-bonnet
label: Brute Bonnet
flavor: It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.

name: flutter-mane
label: Flutter Mane
flavor: It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.

name: slither-wing
label: Slither Wing
flavor: This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

name: sandy-shocks
label: Sandy Shocks
flavor: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.

name: iron-treads
label: Iron Treads
flavor: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal.

name: iron-bundle
label: Iron Bundle
flavor: It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

name: iron-hands
label: Iron Hands
flavor: This Pokémon shares many similarities with Iron Hands, an object mentioned in a certain expedition journal.

name: iron-jugulis
label: Iron Jugulis
flavor: It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.

name: iron-moth
label: Iron Moth
flavor: No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.

name: iron-thorns
label: Iron Thorns
flavor: Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.

name: frigibax
label: Frigibax
flavor: This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

name: arctibax
label: Arctibax
flavor: It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.

name: baxcalibur
label: Baxcalibur
flavor: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

name: gimmighoul
label: Gimmighoul
flavor: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: gholdengo
label: Gholdengo
flavor: It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession.

name: wo-chien
label: Wo-Chien
flavor: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

name: chien-pao
label: Chien-Pao
flavor: The hatred of those who perished by the sword long ago has clad itself in snow and become a Pokémon.

name: ting-lu
label: Ting-Lu
flavor: It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.

name: chi-yu
label: Chi-Yu
flavor: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

name: roaring-moon
label: Roaring Moon
flavor: According to an article in a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.

name: iron-valiant
label: Iron Valiant
flavor: It’s possible that this is the object listed as Iron Valiant in a certain expedition journal.

name: koraidon
label: Koraidon
flavor: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: miraidon
label: Miraidon
flavor: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: walking-wake
label: Walking Wake
flavor: It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.

name: iron-leaves
label: Iron Leaves
flavor: According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.

name: dipplin
label: Dipplin
flavor: The head sticking out belongs to the fore-wyrm, while the tail belongs to the core-wyrm. The two share one apple and help each other out.

name: poltchageist
label: Poltchageist
flavor: Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.

name: sinistcha
label: Sinistcha
flavor: It prefers cool, dark places, such as the back of a shelf or the space beneath a home's floorboards. It wanders in search of prey after sunset.

name: okidogi
label: Okidogi
flavor: Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.

name: munkidori
label: Munkidori
flavor: Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.

name: fezandipiti
label: Fezandipiti
flavor: Fezandipiti beats its glossy wings to scatter pheromones that captivate people and Pokémon.

name: ogerpon
label: Ogerpon
flavor: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: archaludon
label: Archaludon
flavor: It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.

name: hydrapple
label: Hydrapple
flavor: These capricious syrpents have banded together. On the rare occasion that their moods align, their true power is unleashed.

name: gouging-fire
label: Gouging Fire
flavor: It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.

name: raging-bolt
label: Raging Bolt
flavor: It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

name: iron-boulder
label: Iron Boulder
flavor: It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.

name: iron-crown
label: Iron Crown
flavor: There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.

name: terapagos
label: Terapagos
flavor: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: pecharunt
label: Pecharunt
flavor: Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.

name: deoxys-attack
label: Deoxys
flavor: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: deoxys-defense
label: Deoxys
flavor: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: deoxys-speed
label: Deoxys
flavor: Deoxys emerged from a virus that came from space. It is highly intelligent and wields psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon shoots lasers from the crystalline organ on its chest.

name: wormadam-sandy
label: Wormadam
flavor: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.

name: wormadam-trash
label: Wormadam
flavor: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.

name: shaymin-sky
label: Shaymin
flavor: When the turning of seasons brings the cruel winter to its end and the joyous people give thanks to the heavens, Shaymin appears and covers the withered land with flowers.

name: giratina-origin
label: Giratina
flavor: There is one Hisuian verse that tells of a powerful light creating a deep shadow. I imagine that this deep shadow is Giratina.

name: rotom-heat
label: Rotom
flavor: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.

name: rotom-wash
label: Rotom
flavor: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.

name: rotom-frost
label: Rotom
flavor: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.

name: rotom-fan
label: Rotom
flavor: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.

name: rotom-mow
label: Rotom
flavor: This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.

name: castform-sunny
label: Castform
flavor: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform’s disposition!

name: castform-rainy
label: Castform
flavor: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform’s disposition!

name: castform-snowy
label: Castform
flavor: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform’s disposition!

name: basculin-blue-striped
label: Basculin
flavor: Though it differs from other Basculin in several respects, including demeanor—this one is gentle—I have categorized it as a regional form given the vast array of shared qualities.

name: darmanitan-zen
label: Darmanitan
flavor: This Pokémon’s power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: meloetta-pirouette
label: Meloetta
flavor: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

name: tornadus-therian
label: Tornadus
flavor: This storm-stirring Pokémon is said to cause the seasons to turn by whipping up the air. I suspect its humanlike form to be a false one.

name: thundurus-therian
label: Thundurus
flavor: They say this wielder of electricity has waged war with its nemesis, Tornadus, since time immemorial. The lightning bolts it hurls pierce the very earth and enrich the soil.

name: landorus-therian
label: Landorus
flavor: When the incarnations of wind and of lightning clash, Landorus arrives to quell the conflict. After the tempests and thunderbolts abate, the land is sure to be blessed with bountiful harvests.

name: kyurem-black
label: Kyurem
flavor: It appears that this Pokémon uses its powers over ice to freeze its own body in order to stabilize its cellular structure.

name: kyurem-white
label: Kyurem
flavor: It appears that this Pokémon uses its powers over ice to freeze its own body in order to stabilize its cellular structure.

name: keldeo-resolute
label: Keldeo
flavor: They say that Keldeo must survive harsh battles and fully develop the horn on its forehead before this Pokémon’s true power will awaken.

name: meowstic-female
label: Meowstic
flavor: The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.

name: aegislash-blade
label: Aegislash
flavor: Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate others. It once used its powers to force people and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.

name: pumpkaboo-small
label: Pumpkaboo
flavor: The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.

name: pumpkaboo-large
label: Pumpkaboo
flavor: The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.

name: pumpkaboo-super
label: Pumpkaboo
flavor: The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.

name: gourgeist-small
label: Gourgeist
flavor: In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.

name: gourgeist-large
label: Gourgeist
flavor: In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.

name: gourgeist-super
label: Gourgeist
flavor: In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.

name: venusaur-mega
label: Venusaur
flavor: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.

name: charizard-mega-x
label: Charizard
flavor: Its wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

name: charizard-mega-y
label: Charizard
flavor: Its wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

name: blastoise-mega
label: Blastoise
flavor: The rocket cannons on its shell fire jets of water capable of punching holes through thick steel.

name: alakazam-mega
label: Alakazam
flavor: The longer Alakazam lives, the larger and heavier its head becomes. Our tests have shown that the strength of its psychic powers correlates positively to the weight of its head.

name: gengar-mega
label: Gengar
flavor: Possesses potential victims' shadows in an effort to steal away the victims' lives. If your shadow begins to laugh, you must take hold of a protective charm posthaste!

name: kangaskhan-mega
label: Kangaskhan
flavor: There are records of a lost human child being raised by a childless Kangaskhan.

name: pinsir-mega
label: Pinsir
flavor: This Pokémon clamps its pincers down on its prey and then either splits the prey in half or flings it away.

name: gyarados-mega
label: Gyarados
flavor: I suspect this Pokémon to be the true identity of a dragon written of in ancient texts, which claimed that it razed an entire village with white-hot beams from its maw.

name: aerodactyl-mega
label: Aerodactyl
flavor: Aerodactyl’s sawlike fangs can shred skin to tatters—even the skin of Steel-type Pokémon.

name: mewtwo-mega-x
label: Mewtwo
flavor: Its DNA is almost the same as Mew’s. However, its size and disposition are vastly different.

name: mewtwo-mega-y
label: Mewtwo
flavor: Its DNA is almost the same as Mew’s. However, its size and disposition are vastly different.

name: ampharos-mega
label: Ampharos
flavor: Its tail shines bright and strong. It has been prized since long ago as a beacon for sailors.

name: scizor-mega
label: Scizor
flavor: Evolved by way of a curious item. The shell covering its body has been shown to be stronger than forged steel.

name: heracross-mega
label: Heracross
flavor: This Pokémon has an unparalleled horn. Heracross itself demonstrates tremendous power—it's capable of throwing several people trained in the traditional arts of war at once.

name: houndoom-mega
label: Houndoom
flavor: Identifiable by its eerie howls, people a long time ago thought it was the grim reaper and feared it.

name: tyranitar-mega
label: Tyranitar
flavor: The quakes caused when it walks make even great mountains crumble and change the surrounding terrain.

name: blaziken-mega
label: Blaziken
flavor: Blaziken has incredibly strong legs—it can easily clear a 30-story building in one leap. This Pokémon’s blazing punches leave its foes scorched and blackened.

name: gardevoir-mega
label: Gardevoir
flavor: It will dedicate itself to defending a master it has come to adore. Its pure white dress, reminiscent of those worn by ladies of nobility, is the dress of one who is willing to risk their life.

name: mawile-mega
label: Mawile
flavor: It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed.

name: aggron-mega
label: Aggron
flavor: Long ago, there was a king who wore a helmet meant to resemble the head of an Aggron. He was trying to channel the Pokémon’s strength.

name: medicham-mega
label: Medicham
flavor: Through the power of meditation, Medicham developed its sixth sense. It gained the ability to use psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon is known to meditate for a whole month without eating.

name: manectric-mega
label: Manectric
flavor: It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.

name: banette-mega
label: Banette
flavor: Resentment at being cast off made it spring into being. Some say that treating it well will satisfy it, and it will once more become a stuffed toy.

name: absol-mega
label: Absol
flavor: Because of this Pokémon’s ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.

name: garchomp-mega
label: Garchomp
flavor: Soars across the heavens at blinding speed—a magnificent sight! It has a feral disposition. Utmost caution is required if one meets a Garchomp out in the wilds.

name: lucario-mega
label: Lucario
flavor: A most gallant-looking creature. It emits energy waves and controls them with precision, using them to sense even faraway beings. I have given the name ”aura” to this power.

name: abomasnow-mega
label: Abomasnow
flavor: A powerful Pokémon that can split huge boulders with ease. Dislikes associating with others and chooses to live quietly deep within the mountains, playing with the snow.

name: floette-eternal
label: Floette
flavor: It gives its own power to flowers, pouring its heart into caring for them. Floette never forgives anyone who messes up a flower bed.

name: latias-mega
label: Latias
flavor: Latias is highly intelligent and capable of understanding human speech. It is covered with a glass-like down. The Pokémon enfolds its body with its down and refracts light to alter its appearance.

name: latios-mega
label: Latios
flavor: Latios will only open its heart to a Trainer with a compassionate spirit. This Pokémon can fly faster than a jet plane by folding its forelegs to minimize air resistance.

name: swampert-mega
label: Swampert
flavor: Swampert predicts storms by sensing subtle differences in the sounds of waves and tidal winds with its fins. If a storm is approaching, it piles up boulders to protect itself.

name: sceptile-mega
label: Sceptile
flavor: Sceptile has seeds growing on its back. They are said to be bursting with nutrients that revitalize trees. This Pokémon raises the trees in a forest with loving care.

name: sableye-mega
label: Sableye
flavor: It feeds on gemstone crystals. In darkness, its eyes sparkle with the glitter of jewels.

name: altaria-mega
label: Altaria
flavor: This Pokémon has a kind disposition, but if it’s provoked, it will threaten opponents with shrill cries before attacking them without mercy.

name: gallade-mega
label: Gallade
flavor: The blades extending from its elbows are sharper than the finest swords. Its swordsmanship, albeit self-taught, is astonishingly impressive.

name: audino-mega
label: Audino
flavor: This Pokémon has a kind heart. By touching with its feelers, Audino can gauge other creatures’ feelings and physical conditions.

name: sharpedo-mega
label: Sharpedo
flavor: This Pokémon is known as the Bully of the Sea. Any ship entering the waters Sharpedo calls home will be attacked—no exceptions.

name: slowbro-mega
label: Slowbro
flavor: Being bitten by a Shellder shocked this Pokémon into standing on two legs. If the Shellder lets go, it seems Slowbro will turn back into a Slowpoke.

name: steelix-mega
label: Steelix
flavor: This Pokémon evolved through use of a strange item. Its body is coated with steel powder and notably hard—not even diamond can leave so much as a scratch.

name: pidgeot-mega
label: Pidgeot
flavor: This Pokémon flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as wicked weapons.

name: glalie-mega
label: Glalie
flavor: It covers its body with an armor of ice harder than steel. Uses its breath to freeze prey, which it then devours as if they were frozen desserts.

name: diancie-mega
label: Diancie
flavor: It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

name: metagross-mega
label: Metagross
flavor: Metagross is the result of the fusion of two Metang. This Pokémon defeats its opponents through use of its supercomputer-level brain.

name: kyogre-primal
label: Kyogre
flavor: Kyogre is said to be the personification of the sea itself. Legends tell of its many clashes against Groudon, as each sought to gain the power of nature.

name: groudon-primal
label: Groudon
flavor: Through Primal Reversion and with nature’s full power, it will take back its true form. It can cause magma to erupt and expand the landmass of the world.

name: rayquaza-mega
label: Rayquaza
flavor: It flies forever through the ozone layer, consuming meteoroids for sustenance. The many meteoroids in its body provide the energy it needs to Mega Evolve.

name: pikachu-rock-star
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-belle
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-pop-star
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-phd
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-libre
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-cosplay
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: hoopa-unbound
label: Hoopa
flavor: It is said to be able to seize anything it desires with its six rings and six huge arms. With its power sealed, it is transformed into a much smaller form.

name: camerupt-mega
label: Camerupt
flavor: The humps on Camerupt’s back are formed by a transformation of its bones. They sometimes blast out molten magma. This Pokémon apparently erupts often when it is enraged.

name: lopunny-mega
label: Lopunny
flavor: Its fur is warm and yet remarkably light. This Pokémon kicks as though it were a master of karate, driving back its opponents with ease.

name: salamence-mega
label: Salamence
flavor: While basking in the joy of flight generally keeps this Pokémon in high spirits, Salamence turns into an uncontrollable menace if something angers it.

name: beedrill-mega
label: Beedrill
flavor: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.

name: rattata-alola
label: Rattata
flavor: Will chew on anything with its fangs. If you see one, you can be certain that 40 more live in the area.

name: raticate-alola
label: Raticate
flavor: Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for prey.

name: raticate-totem-alola
label: Raticate
flavor: Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for prey.

name: pikachu-original-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-hoenn-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-sinnoh-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-unova-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-kalos-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: pikachu-alola-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: raichu-alola
label: Raichu
flavor: It can discharge bursts of electricity exceeding 100,000 volts— a single strike with that amount of power would incapacitate one of the Copperajah of my homeland.

name: sandshrew-alola
label: Sandshrew
flavor: It burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

name: sandslash-alola
label: Sandslash
flavor: It climbs trees by hooking on with its sharp claws. Sandslash shares the berries it gathers, dropping them down to Sandshrew waiting below the tree.

name: vulpix-alola
label: Vulpix
flavor: In its belly burns a fire, which Vulpix spits out in the form of fireballs. When young, this Pokémon has but one white tail. As the Pokémon matures, this single tail splits into six.

name: ninetales-alola
label: Ninetales
flavor: The coat of gleaming golden fur is quite magnificent. This species is said to store sacred power in its nine long tails and to live for a millennium.

name: diglett-alola
label: Diglett
flavor: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.

name: dugtrio-alola
label: Dugtrio
flavor: These Diglett triplets dig over 60 miles below sea level. No one knows what it’s like underground.

name: meowth-alola
label: Meowth
flavor: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.

name: persian-alola
label: Persian
flavor: Its elegant and refined behavior clashes with that of the barbaric Perrserker. The relationship between the two is one of mutual disdain.

name: geodude-alola
label: Geodude
flavor: Makes its home in mountainous regions, using its arms to climb along harsh mountain roads. Can be troublesome—carelessly kicking one will cause it to fly into a rage and chase after you.

name: graveler-alola
label: Graveler
flavor: Dwells in holes dug into sheer walls of stone. It enjoys rolling down slopes as though it were a boulder during a rockfall, so keep an eye upward while traversing mountain roads.

name: golem-alola
label: Golem
flavor: The rocklike shell is shed each year. The cast-off shell then crumbles, reverting to a mass of soil, which can be spread across fields to promote crop growth.

name: grimer-alola
label: Grimer
flavor: Made of congealed sludge. It smells too putrid to touch. Even weeds won’t grow in its path.

name: muk-alola
label: Muk
flavor: Smells so awful, it can cause fainting. Through degeneration of its nose, it lost its sense of smell.

name: exeggutor-alola
label: Exeggutor
flavor: When they work together, Exeggutor’s three heads can put out powerful psychic energy. Cloudy days make this Pokémon sluggish.

name: marowak-alola
label: Marowak
flavor: When this Pokémon evolved, the skull of its mother fused to it. Marowak’s temperament also turned vicious at the same time.

name: greninja-battle-bond
label: Greninja
flavor: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

name: greninja-ash
label: Greninja
flavor: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

name: zygarde-10-power-construct
label: Zygarde
flavor: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

name: zygarde-50-power-construct
label: Zygarde
flavor: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

name: zygarde-complete
label: Zygarde
flavor: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

name: gumshoos-totem
label: Gumshoos
flavor: Patient by nature, this Pokémon loses control of itself and pounces when it spots its favorite meal—Rattata!

name: vikavolt-totem
label: Vikavolt
flavor: If it carries a Charjabug to use as a spare battery, a flying Vikavolt can rapidly fire high-powered beams of electricity.

name: oricorio-pom-pom
label: Oricorio
flavor: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

name: oricorio-pau
label: Oricorio
flavor: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

name: oricorio-sensu
label: Oricorio
flavor: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

name: lycanroc-midnight
label: Lycanroc
flavor: With swift movements, this Pokémon gradually backs its prey into a corner. Lycanroc’s fangs are always aimed toward opponents’ weak spots.

name: wishiwashi-school
label: Wishiwashi
flavor: When it senses danger, its eyes tear up. The sparkle of its tears signals other Wishiwashi to gather.

name: lurantis-totem
label: Lurantis
flavor: The petals on this Pokémon’s arms are thin and super sharp, and they can fire laser beams if Lurantis gathers light first.

name: salazzle-totem
label: Salazzle
flavor: The winner of competitions between Salazzle is decided by which one has the most male Salandit with it.

name: minior-orange-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-yellow-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-green-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-blue-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-indigo-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-violet-meteor
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-red
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-orange
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-yellow
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-green
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-blue
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-indigo
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: minior-violet
label: Minior
flavor: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

name: mimikyu-busted
label: Mimikyu
flavor: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

name: mimikyu-totem-disguised
label: Mimikyu
flavor: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

name: mimikyu-totem-busted
label: Mimikyu
flavor: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

name: kommo-o-totem
label: Kommo-o
flavor: Certain ruins have paintings of ancient warriors wearing armor made of Kommo-o scales.

name: magearna-original
label: Magearna
flavor: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

name: pikachu-partner-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: marowak-totem
label: Marowak
flavor: When this Pokémon evolved, the skull of its mother fused to it. Marowak’s temperament also turned vicious at the same time.

name: ribombee-totem
label: Ribombee
flavor: Ribombee absolutely hate getting wet or rained on. In the cloudy Galar region, they are very seldom seen.

name: rockruff-own-tempo
label: Rockruff
flavor: This Pokémon intimidates opponents by striking the ground with the rocks on its neck. The moment an opponent flinches, Rockruff attacks.

name: lycanroc-dusk
label: Lycanroc
flavor: With swift movements, this Pokémon gradually backs its prey into a corner. Lycanroc’s fangs are always aimed toward opponents’ weak spots.

name: araquanid-totem
label: Araquanid
flavor: It acts as a caretaker for Dewpider, putting them inside its bubble and letting them eat any leftover food.

name: togedemaru-totem
label: Togedemaru
flavor: When it’s in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

name: necrozma-dusk
label: Necrozma
flavor: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: necrozma-dawn
label: Necrozma
flavor: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: necrozma-ultra
label: Necrozma
flavor: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

name: pikachu-starter
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: eevee-starter
label: Eevee
flavor: Harbors the potential to evolve into manifold forms. Within Eevee lies the key to the mysteries of Pokémon evolution—I'm certain of it.

name: pikachu-world-cap
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: meowth-galar
label: Meowth
flavor: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.

name: ponyta-galar
label: Ponyta
flavor: These Pokémon live in herds out in the grassland. Newborn foals lack their fiery manes, which will develop about an hour after birth.

name: rapidash-galar
label: Rapidash
flavor: Fiery mane aglow, Rapidash darts like an arrow across the land. This prodigiously swift creature can traverse the vast region of Hisui in a day and a half.

name: slowpoke-galar
label: Slowpoke
flavor: When this Pokémon’s tail is soaked in water, sweetness seeps from it. Slowpoke uses this trait to lure in and fish up other Pokémon.

name: slowbro-galar
label: Slowbro
flavor: Being bitten by a Shellder shocked this Pokémon into standing on two legs. If the Shellder lets go, it seems Slowbro will turn back into a Slowpoke.

name: farfetchd-galar
label: Farfetch’d
flavor: They use a plant stalk as a weapon, but not all of them use it in the same way. Several distinct styles of stalk fighting have been observed.

name: weezing-galar
label: Weezing
flavor: It can’t suck in air quite as well as a Galarian Weezing, but the toxins it creates are more potent than those of its counterpart.

name: mr-mime-galar
label: Mr. Mime
flavor: The behavior of this clown-like Pokémon reminds one of pantomime. It creates invisible walls using a force emitted from its fingertips.

name: articuno-galar
label: Articuno
flavor: This Pokémon can control ice at will. Articuno is said to live in snowy mountains riddled with permafrost.

name: zapdos-galar
label: Zapdos
flavor: Zapdos is a legendary bird Pokémon. It’s said that when Zapdos rubs its feathers together, lightning will fall immediately after.

name: moltres-galar
label: Moltres
flavor: There are stories of this Pokémon using its radiant, flame-cloaked wings to light up paths for those lost in the mountains.

name: slowking-galar
label: Slowking
flavor: Slowking can solve any problem presented to it, but no one can understand a thing Slowking says.

name: corsola-galar
label: Corsola
flavor: These Pokémon live in warm seas. In prehistoric times, many lived in the oceans around the Galar region as well.

name: zigzagoon-galar
label: Zigzagoon
flavor: Zigzagoon that adapted to regions outside Galar acquired this appearance. If you’ve lost something, this Pokémon can likely find it.

name: linoone-galar
label: Linoone
flavor: It uses its explosive speed and razor-sharp claws to bring down prey. Running along winding paths is not its strong suit.

name: darumaka-galar
label: Darumaka
flavor: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it’s pushed or pulled.

name: darmanitan-galar-standard
label: Darmanitan
flavor: This Pokémon’s power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: darmanitan-galar-zen
label: Darmanitan
flavor: This Pokémon’s power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: yamask-galar
label: Yamask
flavor: The spirit of a person from a bygone age became this Pokémon. It rambles through ruins, searching for someone who knows its face.

name: stunfisk-galar
label: Stunfisk
flavor: For some reason, this Pokémon smiles slightly when it emits a strong electric current from the yellow markings on its body.

name: zygarde-10
label: Zygarde
flavor: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

name: cramorant-gulping
label: Cramorant
flavor: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.

name: cramorant-gorging
label: Cramorant
flavor: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.

name: toxtricity-low-key
label: Toxtricity
flavor: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

name: eiscue-noice
label: Eiscue
flavor: This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.

name: indeedee-female
label: Indeedee
flavor: Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Positive emotions are the source of its strength.

name: morpeko-hangry
label: Morpeko
flavor: It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.

name: zacian-crowned
label: Zacian
flavor: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.

name: zamazenta-crowned
label: Zamazenta
flavor: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

name: eternatus-eternamax
label: Eternatus
flavor: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.

name: urshifu-rapid-strike
label: Urshifu
flavor: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

name: zarude-dada
label: Zarude
flavor: Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

name: calyrex-ice
label: Calyrex
flavor: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

name: calyrex-shadow
label: Calyrex
flavor: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

name: venusaur-gmax
label: Venusaur
flavor: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.

name: charizard-gmax
label: Charizard
flavor: Its wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

name: blastoise-gmax
label: Blastoise
flavor: The rocket cannons on its shell fire jets of water capable of punching holes through thick steel.

name: butterfree-gmax
label: Butterfree
flavor: It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.

name: pikachu-gmax
label: Pikachu
flavor: Possesses cheek sacs in which it stores electricity. This clever forest-dweller roasts tough berries with an electric shock before consuming them.

name: meowth-gmax
label: Meowth
flavor: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.

name: machamp-gmax
label: Machamp
flavor: In close combat, its four arms afford it offensive and defensive supremacy. In but a blink, this valiant Pokémon can overwhelm its foes with more than 1,000 blows from its fists.

name: gengar-gmax
label: Gengar
flavor: Possesses potential victims' shadows in an effort to steal away the victims' lives. If your shadow begins to laugh, you must take hold of a protective charm posthaste!

name: kingler-gmax
label: Kingler
flavor: Its oversized claw is very powerful, but when it’s not in battle, the claw just gets in the way.

name: lapras-gmax
label: Lapras
flavor: Crossing icy seas is no issue for this cold-resistant Pokémon. Its smooth skin is a little cool to the touch.

name: eevee-gmax
label: Eevee
flavor: Harbors the potential to evolve into manifold forms. Within Eevee lies the key to the mysteries of Pokémon evolution—I'm certain of it.

name: snorlax-gmax
label: Snorlax
flavor: This glutton appears in villages without warning and devours the entirety of their rice granaries—such occurrences have long been counted among the gravest of disasters.

name: garbodor-gmax
label: Garbodor
flavor: The toxic liquid it launches from its right arm is so virulent that it can kill a weakened creature instantly.

name: melmetal-gmax
label: Melmetal
flavor: Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.

name: rillaboom-gmax
label: Rillaboom
flavor: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

name: cinderace-gmax
label: Cinderace
flavor: It’s skilled at both offense and defense, and it gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot.

name: inteleon-gmax
label: Inteleon
flavor: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.

name: corviknight-gmax
label: Corviknight
flavor: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.

name: orbeetle-gmax
label: Orbeetle
flavor: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.

name: drednaw-gmax
label: Drednaw
flavor: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.

name: coalossal-gmax
label: Coalossal
flavor: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.

name: flapple-gmax
label: Flapple
flavor: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.

name: appletun-gmax
label: Appletun
flavor: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.

name: sandaconda-gmax
label: Sandaconda
flavor: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

name: toxtricity-amped-gmax
label: Toxtricity
flavor: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

name: centiskorch-gmax
label: Centiskorch
flavor: While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.

name: hatterene-gmax
label: Hatterene
flavor: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.

name: grimmsnarl-gmax
label: Grimmsnarl
flavor: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.

name: alcremie-gmax
label: Alcremie
flavor: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.

name: copperajah-gmax
label: Copperajah
flavor: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.

name: duraludon-gmax
label: Duraludon
flavor: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.

name: urshifu-single-strike-gmax
label: Urshifu
flavor: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

name: urshifu-rapid-strike-gmax
label: Urshifu
flavor: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

name: toxtricity-low-key-gmax
label: Toxtricity
flavor: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

name: growlithe-hisui
label: Growlithe
flavor: They patrol their territory in pairs. I believe the igneous rock components in the fur of this species are the result of volcanic activity in its habitat.

name: arcanine-hisui
label: Arcanine
flavor: Snaps at its foes with fangs cloaked in blazing flame. Despite its bulk, it deftly feints every which way, leading opponents on a deceptively merry chase as it all but dances around them.

name: voltorb-hisui
label: Voltorb
flavor: An enigmatic Pokémon that happens to bear a resemblance to a Poké Ball. When excited, it discharges the electric current it has stored in its belly, then lets out a great, uproarious laugh.

name: electrode-hisui
label: Electrode
flavor: The tissue on the surface of its body is curiously similar in composition to an Apricorn. When irritated, this Pokémon lets loose an electric current equal to 20 lightning bolts.

name: typhlosion-hisui
label: Typhlosion
flavor: Said to purify lost, forsaken souls with its flames and guide them to the afterlife. I believe its form has been influenced by the energy of the sacred mountain towering at Hisui's center.

name: qwilfish-hisui
label: Qwilfish
flavor: Fishers detest this troublesome Pokémon because it sprays poison from its spines, getting it everywhere. A different form of Qwilfish lives in other regions.

name: sneasel-hisui
label: Sneasel
flavor: Its sturdy, curved claws are ideal for traversing precipitous cliffs. From the tips of these claws drips a venom that infiltrates the nerves of any prey caught in Sneasel's grasp.

name: samurott-hisui
label: Samurott
flavor: Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.

name: lilligant-hisui
label: Lilligant
flavor: I suspect that its well-developed legs are the result of a life spent on mountains covered in deep snow. The scent it exudes from its flower crown heartens those in proximity.

name: zorua-hisui
label: Zorua
flavor: A once-departed soul, returned to life in Hisui. Derives power from resentment, which rises as energy atop its head and takes on the forms of foes. In this way, Zorua vents lingering malice.

name: zoroark-hisui
label: Zoroark
flavor: With its disheveled white fur, it looks like an embodiment of death. Heedless of its own safety, Zoroark attacks its nemeses with a bitter energy so intense, it lacerates Zoroark's own body.

name: braviary-hisui
label: Braviary
flavor: Screaming a bloodcurdling battle cry, this huge and ferocious bird Pokémon goes out on the hunt. It blasts lakes with shock waves, then scoops up any prey that float to the water's surface.

name: sliggoo-hisui
label: Sliggoo
flavor: A creature given to melancholy. I suspect its metallic shell developed as a result of the mucus on its skin reacting with the iron in Hisui's water.

name: goodra-hisui
label: Goodra
flavor: Able to freely control the hardness of its metallic shell. It loathes solitude and is extremely clingy—it will fume and run riot if those dearest to it ever leave its side.

name: avalugg-hisui
label: Avalugg
flavor: The armor of ice covering its lower jaw puts steel to shame and can shatter rocks with ease. This Pokémon barrels along steep mountain paths, cleaving through the deep snow.

name: decidueye-hisui
label: Decidueye
flavor: The air stored inside the rachises of Decidueye's feathers insulates the Pokémon against Hisui's extreme cold. This is firm proof that evolution can be influenced by environment.

name: dialga-origin
label: Dialga
flavor: This Pokémon is revered as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Dialga was what caused the vast river of time to begin flowing in our world.

name: palkia-origin
label: Palkia
flavor: This Pokémon is feared as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Palkia was what caused the walls of our world to disappear, creating a sky that spans for infinity.

name: basculin-white-striped
label: Basculin
flavor: Though it differs from other Basculin in several respects, including demeanor—this one is gentle—I have categorized it as a regional form given the vast array of shared qualities.

name: basculegion-female
label: Basculegion
flavor: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

name: enamorus-therian
label: Enamorus
flavor: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

name: tauros-paldea-combat-breed
label: Tauros
flavor: The Tauros of the Galar region are volatile in nature, and they won’t allow people to ride on their backs.

name: tauros-paldea-blaze-breed
label: Tauros
flavor: The Tauros of the Galar region are volatile in nature, and they won’t allow people to ride on their backs.

name: tauros-paldea-aqua-breed
label: Tauros
flavor: The Tauros of the Galar region are volatile in nature, and they won’t allow people to ride on their backs.

name: wooper-paldea
label: Wooper
flavor: When walking on land, it covers its body with a poisonous film that keeps its skin from dehydrating.

name: oinkologne-female
label: Oinkologne
flavor: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

name: dudunsparce-three-segment
label: Dudunsparce
flavor: It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.

name: palafin-hero
label: Palafin
flavor: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

name: maushold-family-of-three
label: Maushold
flavor: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

name: tatsugiri-droopy
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: tatsugiri-stretchy
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: squawkabilly-blue-plumage
label: Squawkabilly
flavor: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

name: squawkabilly-yellow-plumage
label: Squawkabilly
flavor: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

name: squawkabilly-white-plumage
label: Squawkabilly
flavor: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

name: gimmighoul-roaming
label: Gimmighoul
flavor: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: koraidon-limited-build
label: Koraidon
flavor: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: koraidon-sprinting-build
label: Koraidon
flavor: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: koraidon-swimming-build
label: Koraidon
flavor: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: koraidon-gliding-build
label: Koraidon
flavor: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: miraidon-low-power-mode
label: Miraidon
flavor: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: miraidon-drive-mode
label: Miraidon
flavor: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: miraidon-aquatic-mode
label: Miraidon
flavor: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: miraidon-glide-mode
label: Miraidon
flavor: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: ursaluna-bloodmoon
label: Ursaluna
flavor: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

name: ogerpon-wellspring-mask
label: Ogerpon
flavor: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: ogerpon-hearthflame-mask
label: Ogerpon
flavor: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: ogerpon-cornerstone-mask
label: Ogerpon
flavor: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

name: terapagos-terastal
label: Terapagos
flavor: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: terapagos-stellar
label: Terapagos
flavor: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: clefable-mega
label: Clefable
flavor: Legend says that on clear, quiet nights, it listens for the voices of its kin living on the moon. I, too, often think of my homeland, so far away.

name: victreebel-mega
label: Victreebel
flavor: Lures prey with the sweet aroma of honey. Swallowed whole, the prey is dissolved in a day, bones and all.

name: starmie-mega
label: Starmie
flavor: Starmie swims by spinning its body at high speed. As this Pokémon cruises through the ocean, it absorbs tiny plankton.

name: dragonite-mega
label: Dragonite
flavor: This Pokémon is known as the Sea Incarnate. Figureheads that resemble Dragonite decorate the bows of many ships.

name: meganium-mega
label: Meganium
flavor: The fragrance of Meganium’s flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, this Pokémon gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe’s fighting spirit.

name: feraligatr-mega
label: Feraligatr
flavor: Feraligatr intimidates its foes by opening its huge mouth. In battle, it will kick the ground hard with its thick and powerful hind legs to charge at the foe at an incredible speed.

name: skarmory-mega
label: Skarmory
flavor: People fashion swords from Skarmory’s shed feathers, so this Pokémon is a popular element in heraldic designs.

name: froslass-mega
label: Froslass
flavor: A Pokémon inhabited by the soul of a woman who died bearing a grudge in the snowy mountains. Legends of Froslass placing deathly curses on misbehaving men send shivers down my spine.

name: emboar-mega
label: Emboar
flavor: It has mastered fast and powerful fighting moves. It grows a beard of fire.

name: excadrill-mega
label: Excadrill
flavor: Known as the Drill King, this Pokémon can tunnel through the terrain at speeds of over 90 mph.

name: scolipede-mega
label: Scolipede
flavor: Scolipede engage in fierce territorial battles with Centiskorch. At the end of one of these battles, the victor makes a meal of the loser.

name: scrafty-mega
label: Scrafty
flavor: While mostly known for having the temperament of an aggressive ruffian, this Pokémon takes very good care of its family, friends, and territory.

name: eelektross-mega
label: Eelektross
flavor: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: chandelure-mega
label: Chandelure
flavor: In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence— or so it’s said.

name: chesnaught-mega
label: Chesnaught
flavor: When it takes a defensive posture with its fists guarding its face, it could withstand a bomb blast.

name: delphox-mega
label: Delphox
flavor: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.

name: greninja-mega
label: Greninja
flavor: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

name: pyroar-mega
label: Pyroar
flavor: The temperature of its breath is over 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, but Pyroar doesn’t use it on its prey. This Pokémon prefers to eat raw meat.

name: floette-mega
label: Floette
flavor: It gives its own power to flowers, pouring its heart into caring for them. Floette never forgives anyone who messes up a flower bed.

name: malamar-mega
label: Malamar
flavor: It’s said that Malamar’s hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.

name: barbaracle-mega
label: Barbaracle
flavor: Having an eye on each palm allows it to keep watch in all directions. In a pinch, its limbs start to act on their own to ensure the enemy’s defeat.

name: dragalge-mega
label: Dragalge
flavor: Dragalge generates dragon energy by sticking the plume on its head out above the ocean’s surface and bathing it in sunlight.

name: hawlucha-mega
label: Hawlucha
flavor: It always strikes a pose before going for its finishing move. Sometimes opponents take advantage of that time to counterattack.

name: zygarde-mega
label: Zygarde
flavor: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

name: drampa-mega
label: Drampa
flavor: Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it’s angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.

name: falinks-mega
label: Falinks
flavor: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.

name: raichu-mega-x
label: Raichu
flavor: It can discharge bursts of electricity exceeding 100,000 volts— a single strike with that amount of power would incapacitate one of the Copperajah of my homeland.

name: raichu-mega-y
label: Raichu
flavor: It can discharge bursts of electricity exceeding 100,000 volts— a single strike with that amount of power would incapacitate one of the Copperajah of my homeland.

name: chimecho-mega
label: Chimecho
flavor: Can emit waves of air powerful enough to knock out prey taller than itself. I hypothesize that it amplifies the faint sound of wind within its body.

name: absol-mega-z
label: Absol
flavor: Because of this Pokémon’s ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.

name: staraptor-mega
label: Staraptor
flavor: It has left the flock, having gained strength enough to survive on its own. The astounding force with which Staraptor flies through the air allows it to carry away large, burly targets.

name: garchomp-mega-z
label: Garchomp
flavor: Soars across the heavens at blinding speed—a magnificent sight! It has a feral disposition. Utmost caution is required if one meets a Garchomp out in the wilds.

name: lucario-mega-z
label: Lucario
flavor: A most gallant-looking creature. It emits energy waves and controls them with precision, using them to sense even faraway beings. I have given the name ”aura” to this power.

name: heatran-mega
label: Heatran
flavor: Stories tell of this Pokémon being birthed from the boiling magma within Mount Coronet. Its molten-steel body holds many mysteries.

name: darkrai-mega
label: Darkrai
flavor: On a moonless night, a strange incident occurred in which every one of a village's inhabitants suffered nightmares. The villagers attested that Darkrai appeared before them in these nightmares.

name: golurk-mega
label: Golurk
flavor: There’s a theory that inside Golurk is a perpetual motion machine that produces limitless energy, but this belief hasn’t been proven.

name: meowstic-male-mega
label: Meowstic
flavor: The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.

name: crabominable-mega
label: Crabominable
flavor: Before it stops to think, it just starts pummeling. There are records of its turning back avalanches with a flurry of punches.

name: golisopod-mega
label: Golisopod
flavor: They live in sunken ships or in holes in the seabed. When Golisopod and Grapploct battle, the loser becomes the winner’s meal.

name: magearna-mega
label: Magearna
flavor: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

name: magearna-original-mega
label: Magearna
flavor: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

name: zeraora-mega
label: Zeraora
flavor: Electricity sparks from the pads on its limbs. Wherever Zeraora runs, lightning flashes and thunder echoes.

name: scovillain-mega
label: Scovillain
flavor: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

name: glimmora-mega
label: Glimmora
flavor: Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.

name: tatsugiri-curly-mega
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: tatsugiri-droopy-mega
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: tatsugiri-stretchy-mega
label: Tatsugiri
flavor: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: baxcalibur-mega
label: Baxcalibur
flavor: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

name: meowstic-female-mega
label: Meowstic
flavor: The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.
